diagrams.title: Access Matrix Model
diagrams.description: Conceptual representation of protection state showing subjects and objects
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how access permissions are represented in protection systems

diagrams.title: ACL vs Capability Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of two protection mechanisms
elements: ACL: attached to objects - shows who can access what
Capabilities: attached to subjects - shows what subject can access
Implementation examples: Windows ACL, UNIX permissions
diagrams.purpose: Understand different approaches to implementing access control

diagrams.title: DAC vs MAC vs RBAC
diagrams.description: Comparison of three major access control models
diagrams.purpose: Compare different access control paradigms and their use cases

diagrams.title: OS Security Layers
diagrams.purpose: Understand layered security approach in operating systems
